notes: Medium-complexity AI-generated KiCad-backed pass fixture combining USB-C power, protected 5 V input, an AMS1117 3.3 V regulator rail, I2C sensor, pull-ups, decoupling, and a header. It has clean required KiCad ERC/DRC, route-completion, writer-correctness, and zero-diff round-trip evidence for erc-drc acceptance. This pass does not claim fabrication readiness; AMS1117 manufacturer-specific ESR, effective-capacitance, and thermal review remain required for fabrication-candidate use.
